supporting_quote: C9ORF72 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of C9ORF72, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis. Real-time RT-PCR with TAQ-man primer-probe set RTS3750 (total transcript) / RTS pre-mRNA set. Methods section also notes cyclophilin A as an alternative normalizer, but the cell-line knockdown data are normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: SOD-1 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of SOD-1, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis. Real-time RT-PCR with named primer-probe set (SEQ ID NO:14/15 primers, NO:16 probe). Methods section also lists cyclophilin A as an alternative, but the data are normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: Human PCSK9 primer probe set from ABI (ID# Hs03037355_m1) was used to measure mRNA levels. PCSK9 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of PCSK9, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis. Real-time RT-PCR with ABI TaqMan primer-probe set Hs03037355_m1. Normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: DUX4 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Reduction of DUX4 RNA is presented in the tables below as percent DUX4 RNA relative to the amount of DUX4 RNA in untreated control cells (% UTC).
notes: Ionis. 54-2 = immortalized FSHD myoblast line (Resnick et al. 2019). In-vitro 54-2 cell data normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN (primer-probe set RTS3502). SEPARATE in-vivo mouse xenograft study normalizes to mouse GAPDH (mGapdh_LTS00102, % control) - that is NOT the 54-2 cell-line data.

supporting_quote: KCNQ2 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as percent KCNQ2 RNA levels relative to untreated control cells (% control).
notes: Ionis. Real-time RT-PCR with named primer-probe set (SEQ ID NO:11/12 primers, NO:13 probe). SH-SY5Y cells, normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN.
